title: deile-worker dispatch result (v1)
description: JSON written by worker_server._run_task to WORK_ROOT/.results/<task_id>.json and returned by POST /v1/dispatch and GET /v1/result/{task_id}. schema_version pins the contract so future readers can migrate retroactively (issue #620 AC9).

schema_version.description: Contract version of this result document. A reader that finds a missing or different version serves the payload with a warning (forward compat).

task_id.description: 12-char hex id minted by the worker (uuid4().hex[:12]).

ok.description: Terminal outcome: true=success, false=failure, null=still running (in-memory transient state only).

brief.description: The user brief that was dispatched.

summary.description: Final agent output (success) or error description (failure).

files.description: Workspace files present at the end of the dispatch (capped).

channel_id.description: Discord channel id or synthetic pipeline/CLI id.

workdir.description: Absolute path of the per-channel workspace used.

status_message_id.description: Discord message id of the live status message, or null.

finished_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the result was persisted.

error.description: Terminal error string, present only on failure paths.

resume.description: Structured resume result (issue #254), present only on pipeline dispatches.
